name: Kayle
title: The Judicator
shortBio:
- The Abilities are completely different, except for Divine Blessing (W)
- Leveling up doesn't change her attacks
- Holy Fervor (P) grants Attack Damage as Ability Power and vice versa

skins.name: Silver Kayle
skins.description: Given to players who purchased the Retail Collector's Edition of League of Legends.

skins.name: Viridian Kayle
skins.description: Forest Elves are long lived compared to the humans they live among, and many delve into centuries-long explorations for even a scrap of their empires' lost magic. Those who find it, such as Kayle, are gifted with incredible powers over the natural world.

skins.name: Aether Wing Kayle

chromas.name: Aether Wing Kayle (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Aether Wing Kayle (Ace)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Steel Valkyrie event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Steel Valkyrie event.

skins.description: Authorized pilot of the X07-Gevurah combat exosuit, Kayle is a justicar of the Royal Space Military operating deep in the heart of lawless space. Though her mission is to uphold the fragile postwar peace, years of violent conflict have radicalized her—now she acts as heartless judge, jury, and executioner for anyone or anything that falls beneath her gaze.

skins.name: Riot Kayle
skins.description: A Riot Games skin obtained by either meeting a Rioter or attending an official Riot event in 2014.

skins.name: Immortal Journey Kayle

chromas.name: Immortal Journey Kayle (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

skins.description: The Grounded Foresight School teaches power in knowing one's surroundings, but as Kayle nears immortality, doubt has crept in. Her parents' random deaths fostered a desire to exert as much control as possible in her life, but with her teacher Zed's banishment, the ground is now shaky. Immortality, she hopes, will finally give her solid footing.

skins.name: Silver Kayle Modern
skins.description: Given to players who purchased the Retail Collector's Edition of League of Legends.

skins.name: Classic 2012 Kayle
skins.description: The Judicator was one of League's original 40 champions, blessing her allies with a more supportive kit while also fighting her own battles with searing, angelic fire. Originally an Archangel of Fire able to reflect damage back to foes, every version of Kayle has been quick to deliver brutal, inevitable justice.

passive.name: Holy Fervor
passive.description: Kayle gains a percentage of her Ability Power as Attack damage and a percentage of her Attack Damage as Ability Power.

spells.name: Reckoning
spells.description: Kayle blasts a target, dealing damage, slowing their movement speed, and applying a stack of Holy Fervor.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kayle blasts a target, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> while <status>Slowing</status> by @SlowPercent@% and increasing Kayle's damage to them by @DamageAmp*100@% for @Duration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Divine Blessing
spells.description: Kayle blesses an allied champion, increasing their movement speed and healing them.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kayle blesses an allied champion, increasing their <speed>Movement Speed</speed> by @MoveSpeed*100@% for @Duration@ seconds and healing them for <healing>@TotalHeal@ health</healing>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Righteous Fury
spells.description: Kayle increases her attack range and her basic attacks deals additional damage to her target and nearby enemies.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kayle increases her attack range by @BonusRange@ for @Duration@ seconds and her basic attacks deal <magicDamage>@TargetDamage@ additional magic damage</magicDamage> on-hit. Nearby enemies take <magicDamage>@SplashDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> on attack.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Intervention
spells.description: Bathes Kayle's target in a holy light, rendering them immune to all damage for a short time.
spells.dynamicDescription: Kayle bathes an allied champion in holy light, making them Invulnerable for @Duration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
